untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) consolidation range establishment with specific threshold parameters [base_confirmation_bars, entry_position_in_range, range_tightness_requirement]; (2) explicit 'no momentum divergence signals' check; (3) precise stop loss and take profit multipliers of base range. These require either multi-bar pattern recognition logic or custom range-detection functions not available in the allowed indicator set. price_pos_20 approximates bottom-of-range positioning but does not confirm active consolidation phase.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture: (1) price near bottom of range using price_pos_20 < 0.3; (2) low volume during consolidation using vol_ratio_20 < 1.0; (3) absence of momentum divergence approximated by rsi_14 < 70 (not overbought). Exit condition uses pivot support (s1) as proxy for breakout failure. Direction set to LONG as consolidation-before-breakout typically precedes upside moves. Original signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT but treated as LONG given typical breakout pattern. Thresholds for stop_loss_pct (2.0) and hold_days_max (20) are reasonable defaults but author did not specify.
